# Andrej Focic

## Identity
- Name: Andrej Focic
- Location: Dublin, Ireland
- Role: Full-stack & Agentic Engineer
- Email: andrej@fole.dev
- Site: https://fole.dev

## Focus
Full-stack product development from database to deploy. Currently exploring agentic engineering, LLM tooling, and AI-assisted development workflows.

## Tech
TypeScript, React, Rust, Astro, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Docker, Claude, LLM tooling, agent frameworks. Self-hosts on VPS with hands-on DevOps (Linux, Nginx, CI/CD, infrastructure management).

## Projects
- IntReBit: CRM/SaaS platform built with React and Rust
- fole.dev: Personal portfolio and blog built with Astro

## Writing
Active on dev.to covering software engineering, agentic engineering, and building with AI.

## Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/anfocic
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/afocic/
- DEV: https://dev.to/fole
- RSS: https://fole.dev/rss.xml

## Open to
Collaboration, open source, and conversations about agentic engineering and full-stack development.
